headline: GL Q1 Deep Dive: Life and Health Premiums Grow, Guidance Highlights AI and Margin Focus
summary: Insurance holding company Globe Life (NYSE:GL) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 5.4% year on year to $1.56 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $3.43 per share was 1.3% below analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on Globe Life, Raises Price Target to $185
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Mark Hughes   maintains Globe Life (NYSE:GL) with a Buy and raises the price target from $180 to $185.

headline: Globe Life Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
